runtimeEvidence.reason: production database changes require an approved backup, staging rehearsal and migration-history reconciliation

corrections: schema audit now reports each missing table and column instead of failing at the first query
auth audit reads only safe authorization columns and never prints profile personal data
hierarchy is not inferred when the canonical columns are absent
production migration remains blocked until staging proves the complete chain
requiredReleaseSequence: create and verify a database backup
reconcile local and remote migration history
rehearse the complete additive chain in staging
run audit:runtime-schema and audit:auth-hierarchy in staging
apply the approved migration and repeat both read-only audits
